releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bugfixes: UCD Re-downloading fixed (again)

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.7.3%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Unicode characters have unbounded string length, since they can be represented as multi-length strings in JavaScript when combining marks are used in a character.

Fixes #15 (again).

## What's Changed

* Release/0.7.3 by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-unicode-search/pull/16

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-unicode-search/compare/0.7.2...0.7.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bugfixes: UCD Re-downloading fixed

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.7.2%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Multi-codepoint Unicode characters are now considered as normal, fixing the issue where the plugin constantly re-downloaded the character database.

Fixes #15.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bugfixes: Character Filter & Character Download on Mobile

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.7.1%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Character filter now correctly saves, and isn't overwritten every time the plugin loads.
A workaround was implemented for fetching the character database on mobile.

### Changes

- Fix save data checking for "filter" data fragment
- An alternative UCD download location will be used if Unicode HTTP request fails
- User is notified about UCD downloads/updates
- Update Obsidian API version

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Favorite Characters

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.7.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

You can now add favorite characters, and assign them as hotkeys in Obsidian!
Check out the plugin settings to try it out!

### Changes

- Add favorite characters with accompanying UI
- User data initialization framework for changes in data structure
- Updated packages
- Update Obsidian API version

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Filter Searchable Unicode Characters

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.6.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

The plugin now allows you to filter searchable characters in the new settings menu.

![image](https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-unicode-search/assets/73384901/86982189-9d47-41dc-b959-355adb28dcbc)

### Changes

- Added a new settings tab for user filters.
- Save data structure has changed completely.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Search by Unicode Code Points

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.5.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

![image](https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-unicode-search/assets/73384901/37590595-e531-47ca-87fa-663607a2cea7)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes 🐞

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.4.1%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

The previous release introduced changes that broke functionality on mobile devices.

- The plugin should now load fine on mobile devices.
- Save data should persist between loading and unloading the plugin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## More Unicode Characters ☄

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.4.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

The plugin automatically retrieves data from Unicode servers. 

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73384901/236696008-806adfe8-d08a-486d-8169-4810b4ec4c3e.png)

### Changes

- Character information is now fetched directly from [Unicode Character Database](https://www.unicode.org/Public/UCD/latest).
	- This fixes (subset of) issue #1.
	- Characters are still filtered, details can be seen [here](https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-unicode-search/blob/ab5662665ed58e48639398026a46c3f051e05481/src/unicode-search/service/ucd.service.ts#L48).
- Structure of the _data.json_ file has changed.
	- The plugin will overwrite the data on first startup.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Usage Prioritized Character Suggestion

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22unicode-search%22%5D%5B%220.3.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Usage of characters now dictates the order of suggested items.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73384901/234391082-4bd95c18-d7c7-41e5-8b70-fc8c7c23e17f.png)

### Changes

- Characters are now ordered by usage statistics.
- Each time a character is inserted, a timestamp and `+1` usage is recorded.
- The suggestion window shows characters in the following order:
	1. Recently used characters.
	2. Frequently used characters.
	3. The rest is ordered alphabetically by the character's description.
- Visual indicators can be seen in the suggestion window:
	- Recent: `↩` for the 3 most recently used characters.
	- Frequent: `↺` for characters with above average use count.
